title: Agricraft Create Compat
description: A small patch to allow Create harvesters to harvest AgriCraft plants.
body:
This mod adds a small patch to Create harvesters to allow them to harvest AgriCraft plants. This means you can actually automate the harvesting of them with any Create contraption you like.

It is a very targeted change, so it might not work with updated versions of AgriCraft or Create.
